articles.title: Texas AG sues Meta over claims that WhatsApp doesn't provide end-to-end encryption
articles.content: Critics note a lack of factual support in lawsuit filed by US Senate candidate.
articles.titleZh: Texas AG起诉Meta ，指控WhatsApp不提供端到端加密
articles.contentZh: 批评人士指出，美国参议院候选人提起的诉讼缺乏事实支持。

articles.title: A hacker group is poisoning open source code at an unprecedented scale
articles.content: GitHub is just the latest victim of TeamPCP, a gang that has carried out a spree of software supply chain attacks.
articles.titleZh: 一个黑客组织正在以前所未有的规模毒害开源代码
articles.contentZh: GitHub只是TeamPCP的最新受害者，该团伙实施了一系列软件供应链攻击。

articles.title: US government takes $2 billion equity stake in nine quantum computing firms
articles.content: Beneficiaries include startup backed by firm with links to the Trump family.
articles.titleZh: 美国政府获得9家量子计算公司20亿美元股权
articles.contentZh: 受益者包括与特朗普家族有联系的公司支持的创业公司。

articles.title: Google publishes exploit code threatening millions of Chromium users
articles.content: Google publishes exploit code before patch, reported 42 months earlier, is fixed.
articles.titleZh: 谷歌发布威胁数百万Chromium用户的漏洞代码
articles.contentZh: 在修复42个月前报告的补丁之前， Google发布了漏洞利用代码。

articles.title: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
articles.content: Memorial Day is nearly here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. If your weekend plans involve pool parties or barbecues, now is a great time to pick up a portable speaker or set of solar lights, as many of our favorite models are currently on sale. You can also find deals on everything […]
articles.titleZh: 本周末您可以购买的最佳阵亡将士纪念日促销活动
articles.contentZh: 阵亡将士纪念日即将到来，这意味着季节性销售如火如荼。如果您的周末计划涉及泳池派对或烧烤，现在是购买便携式扬声器或一套太阳能灯的好时机，因为我们目前有许多最喜欢的型号正在出售。您还可以查找所有[…]的优惠

articles.title: On Trails is a wandering tale that blends hiking, science, and history
articles.content: Hiking is one of life's great joys. Turning off the screens and stepping out into nature for an extended period of time, perhaps even several days, is rejuvenating. Unfortunately, as someone with two young kids and a bad back, I'm not really able to go backpacking anymore. So I often find myself trying to live […]
articles.titleZh: On Trails是一个融合了徒步旅行、科学和历史的流浪故事
articles.contentZh: 徒步旅行是人生最大的乐趣之一。关闭屏幕，长时间走进大自然，甚至可能几天，正在恢复活力。不幸的是，作为一个有两个小孩和背部不好的人，我真的不能再去背包旅行了。所以我经常发现自己在努力生活[…]
